title: Snowflake ID: relaxed memory ordering on CAS
description: Using Ordering::Relaxed on atomic load and compare_exchange for ID generation permits stale reads and duplicate/non-monotonic IDs on ARM. Correct pairing: Acquire on load, AcqRel on CAS. Check Broadside's ID generator.
close_reason: Not vulnerable: id.rs uses fetch_add (indivisible RMW), not a CAS loop. Relaxed ordering is safe for uniqueness with fetch_add. Non-monotonic ordering within same millisecond is documented and benign.
